description: Scope — Chrome Cathedral, desaturated AI with metallic fog
code:
// Scope — Chrome Cathedral
// AI feed composited with noise field, monochrome metallic feel

scope.prompt('molten chrome cathedral interior, volumetric fog shafts, reflective liquid metal surfaces')
  .noise(0.10)
  .vace(1.0)
  .step1(900)
  .step2(650)
  .step3(400)

AUDIO.bins = 4; AUDIO.smooth = 0.88; AUDIO.apply();
var low = env(() => a.fft[0] || 0, 0.25, 0.05);
var mid = env(() => a.fft[1] || 0, 0.3, 0.06);
var high = env(() => a.fft[3] || 0, 0.2, 0.08);

speed = 0.3

const rampMask = () => Math.min(1, time * 0.7)

// Scope NDI — desaturated for chrome look
src(s3)
  .saturate(0.15)
  .contrast(1.3)
  .brightness(0.02)
  .out(o1)

// slow noise warp field
noise(1.0, 0.006)
  .modulate(noise(0.5, 0.004), 0.03)
  .color(0.15, 0.12, 0.2)
  .out(o2)

// composite — AI chrome + noise fog + feedback trail
src(o1)
  .add(src(o2), 0.2)
  .modulateScale(noise(0.6, 0.008), () => 0.004 + low() * 0.002)
  .modulate(noise(1.2, 0.01), () => 0.01 + mid() * 0.004)
  .color(
    () => 0.75 + low() * 0.06,
    () => 0.78 + mid() * 0.04,
    () => 0.85 + high() * 0.05
  )
  .saturate(() => 0.3 + low() * 0.05)
  .blend(src(o0).scale(1.0008).rotate(() => Math.sin(time * 0.015) * 0.0008), () => rampMask() * 0.80)
  .colorama(() => 0.001 + high() * 0.0004)
  .contrast(1.08)
  .out(o0)
